Onyx Record Press — Arcadia, CA — Pheenix Alpha AD12
Created with Perplexity Computer
140

jobs.specialInstructions: Splatter pattern per client mockup. No regrind.
Metallic labels. Handle with lint-free gloves.
Large run — may split across weeks. Deposit held.

sample.notes: Color splatter run — pattern consistency good. AD12 defaults + extended heat for clear/splatter.

sample.colorBlend: 80% clear / 20% red pellet mix, random splatter

stoppages.reason: Label magazine jam — cleared and re-loaded

sample.qualityNotes: Splatter pattern looking consistent after first 50 cycles. Slight non-fill at startup — resolved after temp stabilized.
sample.shiftNotes: Running Puscifer clear/red splatter. Extended heat cycle for clear compound. Color pattern approved by Moe at 09:15. Steady run after initial startup adjustments.
sample.nextShiftHandoff: Press is warm and running. ~153 units remaining on this order. Labels pre-loaded for Side A/B.

sample.title: Daily Safety Inspection
sample.notes: Per Pheenix Section 3: safety switches, hatches, EMS test
Lead from Surachai, stopped responding to emails sent last follow up 06/27. New message about discounts 10/03. Booked ONX-2026-001.
sample.lastCommunication: Job delivered 02/01 — signed by A. Bartlett

sample.name: RTI (Record Technology Inc.)
sample.notes: Primary plating house. 3-day turnaround on stampers. Handles lacquer & DMM. Don is direct contact for rush orders.
sample.productsServices: Lacquer plating, stamper production, DMM cutting, quality inspection
